name: lsrw-platform
description: LSRW.PRO — AI-powered Listening, Speaking, Reading & Writing placement-prep platform.

scripts.serve: node -e "const h=require('http'),f=require('fs'),p=require('path'),P=process.env.PORT||5173;h.createServer((q,s)=>{let u=decodeURIComponent(q.url.split('?')[0]);if(u==='/')u='/index.html';const fp=p.join(process.cwd(),u);f.readFile(fp,(e,d)=>{if(e){s.writeCode=404;s.statusCode=404;return s.end('Not found');}const t={'.html':'text/html','.js':'text/javascript','.mjs':'text/javascript','.css':'text/css','.svg':'image/svg+xml','.png':'image/png','.json':'application/json'}[p.extname(fp)]||'application/octet-stream';s.setHeader('Content-Type',t);s.end(d);});}).listen(P,()=>console.log('LSRW dev server → http://localhost:'+P));"
